ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The matter was properly noticed and there being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 21, 2014 is admitted to probate. Dennis C. Yee and Dale M. Yee are appointed as the Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for November 1, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.
